title: Iran War: Pentagon May Deploy 82nd Airborne
summary: Escalating Iran war may lead to Pentagon deploying the 82nd Airborne division to the Middle East.
charlotte_impact: Potential escalation of conflict increases geopolitical instability and risk of further military engagement.

title: Democrat Wins Florida Special Election
summary: Emily Gregory (Democrat) wins the Florida special election in Mar-a-Lago’s district.

title: Trump Approval Plummets Amid Iran War, Fuel Price Surge
summary: Trump's approval rating hits a new low of 36% as fuel prices surge during the Iran war, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll.
charlotte_impact: Indicates public dissatisfaction with current administration policies amid international conflict.

title: Iran Imposes Hormuz Transit Fees

title: ICE Agents' Pay vs. Unpaid TSA Workers
summary: Contrasting ICE agents' compensation with TSA workers going without pay raises questions.

title: California Governor Debate Canceled Over Diversity Concerns
summary: California governor debate canceled after criticism for excluding candidates of color.

title: TSA Tipped Off ICE Before Airport Arrests

title: DHS Funding Proposal Fails
summary: DHS funding proposal fails due to doubts from Democrats, conservatives, and Trump.

title: Iran Receives US Ceasefire Proposal

title: Stock Futures Rise on Potential Iran War Resolution
